theme in E minor; arpeggiated LH accompaniment over a lyrical, sighing RH melody with characteristic descending contour and Andante character."},{"id":"A'","bar_start":10,"bar_end":21,"description":"Varied repetition of A theme with added ornamentation, inner voices, and chromatic intensification; expands through secondary dominants toward F# minor area."},{"id":"B","bar_start":22,"bar_end":30,"description":"Middle section in B major and C# minor; more sustained chordal texture with melodic elaboration in the RH; lyrical contrasting theme with rising sequences."},{"id":"A''","bar_start":31,"bar_end":45,"description":"Recapitulation of A theme with extensive embellishments, rapid ornamental figures (turns, runs), and increased rhythmic complexity; climactic approach with ff dynamic."},{"id":"Coda","bar_start":46,"bar_end":57,"description":"Coda in E minor/major; pp ethereal texture with sustained harmonies, chromatic inner voices, arpeggiated figures, and final resolution to tonic E; ends with written-out fermata chord."}]}
